speaker: Arnold Schwarzenegger
caption:
Don't let others tell you who to be. Figure out for yourself what makes you happy. — Arnold Schwarzenegger. The blueprint to building your own life.

#arnold #success #vision #selfmade #asalilife #motivation

speaker: Jim Carrey
caption:
"You can fail at what you don't want, so you might as well take a chance on doing what you love." — Jim Carrey. Choose love over fear.

#jimcarrey #fearvslove #purpose #asalilife #followyourheart #motivation

speaker: Al Pacino
caption:
"The inches we need are everywhere around us." — Al Pacino, Any Given Sunday. Fight for every single inch in front of you.

#alpacino #anygivensunday #inches #fighter #asalilife #nevergiveup

speaker: Rocky Balboa
caption:
"It ain't about how hard you hit. It's about how hard you can get hit and keep moving forward." — Rocky Balboa. That's how winning is done.

#rocky #nevergiveup #resilience #keepgoing #asalilife #strength

speaker: Les Brown
caption:
"You gotta be HUNGRY!" — Les Brown. Greatness doesn't come to those who wait. It comes to those who are starving for it.

#lesbrown #hungry #greatness #motivation #asalilife #dreambig

speaker: Matthew McConaughey
caption:
"My hero is me in 10 years." — Matthew McConaughey. Always be chasing a better version of yourself. You'll never catch it, and that's the point.

#matthewmcconaughey #hero #selfimprovement #oscar #asalilife #growth
